issue.errorLine1: <string name="load_sources_strain_help">Controls TRIMP, acute/chronic load (ACWR), Strain Ratio, Load Score, and Readiness. \"Workout only\" counts only exercise sessions; \"Everyday heart-rate load\" also counts elevated heart rate outside workouts, such as from stress, illness, or heat.</string>
